stack.cms: Payload CMS 3 (embedded in the Next.js app)

project.name: FUKIONE — Website Bán Lẻ Sàn Gỗ (wooden-floor)

architecture.summary: Single Next.js deploy with Payload CMS 3 embedded (web + CMS + /admin + REST/GraphQL API in one app); PostgreSQL-owned data designed to evolve to a Phase-2 Spring Boot service sharing the same DB.

key_layers.name: Pages/UI
key_layers.responsibility: Next.js App Router routes (SSG/ISR), Tailwind + shadcn/ui

key_layers.name: CMS/Data
key_layers.responsibility: Payload collections: Products, Collections, Articles, Projects, Leads, Settings

key_layers.name: Lead handler
key_layers.responsibility: Save lead to DB first, then send email (Resend), anti-spam

external_deps.service: GA4 / Google Search Console / Business Profile

gotchas: English for all repo artifacts (docs, code, .claude/**); only user-Claude chat is Vietnamese
No emoji or « » guillemets in Mermaid diagrams (tofu-font rendering issue); validate with mmdc
Prices/unit-costs live in the Payload `Settings` collection — never hardcode them
Lead must never be lost: write to DB first, send email as a separate step with retry
Public URLs are Vietnamese-no-accent (/san-pham, /bao-gia) for VN SEO
Payload-generated artifacts (migrations, generated types, /admin) are not hand-edited
test_isolation: Integration/e2e need a Postgres instance + env vars

conventions.language_policy: English-only artifacts; Vietnamese only in user-Claude chat

memory_system: Pre-existing custom project-memory at .claude/memory/ (decisions/, conventions/, HANDOFF.md, sessions/) with SessionStart + Stop hooks and a save-memory skill. Left intact.
